title: curcuma supraneeana
intro: Curcuma supraneeana, also known as yellow ginger, is a species of plant in the ginger family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible rhizomes. The medicinal properties of Curcuma supraneeana are attributed to its high concentration of volatile oils, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Curcuma supraneeana include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant effects, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Curcuma supraneeana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
